attributes.title: [vSphere OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Top-level vSphere environment health: entity counts, cluster capacity gauges, and datacenter-level aggregates from the OTel vcenterreceiver.

params.markdown:
## [vSphere OTel] Overview

This dashboard provides a high-level view of vSphere environment health:
- Cluster, host, VM, and datastore inventory
- Host CPU and memory utilization gauges
- Cluster CPU and memory capacity headroom
- VM power state distribution
- Datacenter-level disk space

query.esql:
TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.cluster.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS clusters = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.cluster.count))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.cluster.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS clusters = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.cluster.count))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.host.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS hosts = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.host.count))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.host.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS hosts = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.host.count))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.vm.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS vms = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.vm.count))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.vm.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS vms = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.vm.count))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.datastore.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS datastores = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.datastore.count))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.datastore.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS datastores = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.datastore.count))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.cluster.vm.count IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.power_state == "on"
| STATS vms_on = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.cluster.vm.count))

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.cluster.vm.count IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.power_state == "on"
| STATS vms_on = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.cluster.vm.count))

FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.cluster.count IS NOT NULL OR vcenter.datacenter.host.count IS NOT NULL OR vcenter.datacenter.vm.count IS NOT NULL OR vcenter.datacenter.datastore.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS clusters = MAX(vcenter.datacenter.cluster.count), hosts = MAX(vcenter.datacenter.host.count), vms = MAX(vcenter.datacenter.vm.count), datastores = MAX(vcenter.datacenter.datastore.count) BY vcenter.datacenter.name
| SORT vcenter.datacenter.name ASC

FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.cluster.count IS NOT NULL OR vcenter.datacenter.host.count IS NOT NULL OR vcenter.datacenter.vm.count IS NOT NULL OR vcenter.datacenter.datastore.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS clusters = MAX(vcenter.datacenter.cluster.count), hosts = MAX(vcenter.datacenter.host.count), vms = MAX(vcenter.datacenter.vm.count), datastores = MAX(vcenter.datacenter.datastore.count) BY vcenter.datacenter.name
| SORT vcenter.datacenter.name ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.cluster.cpu.effective IS NOT NULL
| STATS effective = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.cluster.cpu.effective)), total = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.cluster.cpu.limit))
| EVAL pct = ROUND(effective * 100.0 / total, 1) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 100, _gauge_goal = 80

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.cluster.cpu.effective IS NOT NULL
| STATS effective = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.cluster.cpu.effective)), total = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.cluster.cpu.limit))
| EVAL pct = ROUND(effective * 100.0 / total, 1) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 100, _gauge_goal = 80

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.cluster.memory.effective IS NOT NULL
| STATS effective = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.cluster.memory.effective)), total = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.cluster.memory.limit))
| EVAL pct = ROUND(effective * 100.0 / total, 1) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 100, _gauge_goal = 80

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.cluster.memory.effective IS NOT NULL
| STATS effective = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.cluster.memory.effective)), total = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.cluster.memory.limit))
| EVAL pct = ROUND(effective * 100.0 / total, 1) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 100, _gauge_goal = 80

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization)) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 100, _gauge_goal = 80

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS util = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization)) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 100, _gauge_goal = 80

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.cpu.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.cpu.utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.memory.utilization)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), vcenter.host.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.cluster.vm.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS vm_count = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.cluster.vm.count)) BY attributes.power_state

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.cluster.vm.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS vm_count = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.cluster.vm.count)) BY attributes.power_state

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.disk.space IS NOT NULL
| STATS space = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.disk.space)) BY vcenter.datacenter.name, attributes.disk_state

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.datacenter.disk.space IS NOT NULL
| STATS space = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(vcenter.datacenter.disk.space)) BY vcenter.datacenter.name, attributes.disk_state

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.network.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.network.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE vcenter.host.network.throughput IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.object == "*"
| STATS throughput = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(vcenter.host.network.throughput)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC
